subcodes.first_line: O Shaykh! The days of life, like unto the wind, have no constancy, nor shall they ever possess it. Strive thou, therefore, that in this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شیخ ایام عمر مانند اریاح ثباتی نداشته و نخواهد داشت جهد نما تا در این
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual transformation
